name: sdv-toolkit
description: SportsDataverse engineering toolkit: codegen-safe edit guards, multi-provider league/source scaffolding (ESPN/Fox/CBS/Yahoo/247/Torvik), returns-schema + docstring auditors, network-layer review, pandas→polars-1.2+ conversion, R↔Python porting, the Python dev-workflow (preflight/ship/release/address-bot-reviews), and SDV-style R pkgdown/roxygen helpers. Shared across the ~40 SDV repos (Python + R).
